Tuitility
Base URL: https://tuitility.vercel.app
Preferred mirror: https://tuitility.vercel.app/site-mirror.md

Purpose:
- Tuitility is a browser-based collection of calculators, converters, PDF tools, image tools, and productivity utilities.
- The site focuses on free, client-side tools with tool-specific SEO content, schema markup, internal links, and trust pages.
- Use this file as a concise entry point and the markdown mirror for broader page coverage.

Primary public pages:
- Home: https://tuitility.vercel.app/
- About: https://tuitility.vercel.app/about
- Contact: https://tuitility.vercel.app/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://tuitility.vercel.app/privacy-policy
- Terms and Conditions: https://tuitility.vercel.app/terms-and-conditions

Category hubs:
- Math: https://tuitility.vercel.app/math
- Finance: https://tuitility.vercel.app/finance
- Science: https://tuitility.vercel.app/science
- Health: https://tuitility.vercel.app/health
- Utility Tools: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools
- Knowledge: https://tuitility.vercel.app/knowledge

Representative science tools:
- Wave Speed Calculator: https://tuitility.vercel.app/science/calculators/wave-speed-calculator
- Gravity Calculator: https://tuitility.vercel.app/science/calculators/gravity-calculator
- Work Power Calculator: https://tuitility.vercel.app/science/calculators/work-power-calculator

- Average Atomic Mass Calculator: https://tuitility.vercel.app/science/calculators/average-atomic-mass-calculator

- Retirement Calculator: https://tuitility.vercel.app/finance/calculators/retirement-calculator

Representative math tools:

- Integral Calculator: https://tuitility.vercel.app/math/calculators/integral-calculator
- Binary Calculator: https://tuitility.vercel.app/math/calculators/binary-calculator

High-signal utility and document tools:
- PDF Merger: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/converter-tools/merge-pdf
- PDF Splitter: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/converter-tools/split-pdf
- PDF Organizer: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/converter-tools/organize-pdf
- PDF to Image Converter: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/converter-tools/pdf-to-image-converter
- OCR PDF Generator: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/ocr-pdf-generator
- Image to WebP Converter: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/image-tools/image-to-webp-converter
- Aspect Ratio Converter: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/image-tools/aspect-ratio-converter
- Color Blindness Simulator: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/image-tools/color-blindness-simulator
- RGB to Pantone Converter: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/rgb-to-pantone-converter
- QR Code Generator: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/qr-code-generator
- QR Code Scanner: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/qr-code-scanner
- HTML to Markdown Converter: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/html-to-markdown-converter
- English to IPA Translator: https://tuitility.vercel.app/utility-tools/english-to-ipa-translator

Developer and editorial signals:
- Many pages use structured data such as WebApplication, FAQPage, HowTo, and page-level canonical tags.
- Contact and tool feedback forms route through the same mail-backed endpoint.
- Trust and policy pages are live and intended to support future AdSense readiness and stronger content quality signals.
- Tool pages increasingly include related-tool sections to create stronger semantic clusters for users, search engines, and AI readers.
- Most pages combine an interactive tool with explanatory content, examples, FAQ content, and internal navigation.

How to traverse the site:
- Start from a category hub for cluster context.
- Use the markdown mirror for fuller route coverage.
- Use the sitemap for canonical URL discovery.
- Follow related-tool sections on tool pages for connected intents and adjacent workflows.

Companion documentation:
- Markdown mirror: https://tuitility.vercel.app/site-mirror.md
- Sitemap: https://tuitility.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://tuitility.vercel.app/robots.txt
